role_adherence_notes.landscape: Analyzed soil color and vegetation types.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Synthesized utility poles and fencing styles.

visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Red soil and purple trees clearly visible.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: Jacaranda and Aloe plants clearly visible.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Signage and road surface match description.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The agents unanimously identified South Africa based on strong visual evidence (Pty Ltd, Jacarandas, Aloe). The judge correctly followed Path A (consensus) and confirmed the prediction.
verdict.region_narrowing_notes: Perfect consensus across all five agents on the Southern African region, driven by the unique combination of regulatory (Pty Ltd) and botanical (Jacaranda/Aloe) markers.
verdict.hypothesis_pool_notes: The pool correctly identified South Africa as the primary candidate, with Zimbabwe as a plausible secondary option based on shared geography.
